text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Monday, November 11. You have backlog grooming with Greg at 1 PM, and Lily needs to be picked up from daycare.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. Our Twilio integration is throwing 400 rate limit errors during signups. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! That sounds critical. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Good planning. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. That's wonderful. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Jarvis, Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. We have a conflict about whether to prioritize security or speed for the launch. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. That is a common bottleneck. Security must come first for patient data. We can cite HIPAA standards to Greg to resolve the dispute. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Researching rover power systems in depth. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've indexed the research notes. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Looking over our mortgage options. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Took Lily to her medical checkup. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've logged your vitals. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick log: Prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. Greg Holloway wants to drop billing integration to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. I can help with that. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of billing integration now and iterating later is a good compromise. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. That sounds like a sweet moment. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Helping Ethan with his homework tonight. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 3rd grade advanced grade level now. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Great update. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. We have a conflict about whether to prioritize security or speed for the launch. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: I've noted that. Security must come first for patient data. We can cite HIPAA standards to Greg to resolve the dispute. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Writing scripts to process image datasets. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I've indexed the research notes. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah and I are looking at home listings in Frisco online. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Budget tracking is updated. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Reviewing my sleep tracker logs. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Great consistency with running. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. CareConnect meetings took up most of the day. CareConnect prep is moving along. Got document checklists ready for the mortgage refinance. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
